description: Album releases, artists, concerts, charts, and the music industry. Owns AI applied to music generation.
embeddings: Artist releases a new studio album that tops the charts on release
Pop star announces a world tour with sold-out stadium concerts
Grammy Awards honor the best album and song of the year
Musician drops a surprise single climbing the streaming charts
Band reunites for a comeback tour after years apart
Rapper and hip-hop artist releases a long-anticipated mixtape
Coachella and Glastonbury festival reveals its headline lineup
Singer collaborates with a producer on a chart-topping hit
Music streaming service Spotify and Apple Music reports record streams
Rock band announces a farewell tour and retirement from touring
Record label signs a breakout artist to a major recording deal
Live concert and Las Vegas residency draws thousands of fans
Music video premieres and racks up millions of views
Classical orchestra and opera performs an acclaimed premiere
Country music star wins an award at the CMA ceremony
Album goes platinum with record-breaking first-week sales
Musician wins a lawsuit over song copyright and royalties
DJ and electronic artist headlines a dance music festival
K-pop group breaks records with a new album release
Singer-songwriter debuts an intimate acoustic project
Band members feud leading to a lineup change and split
Tribute concert honors a late legendary musician
Billboard Hot 100 music chart crowns a new number one single
Artist teases an upcoming album with a cryptic announcement
Jazz and blues musician celebrated for a lifetime achievement
AI-generated music and voice cloning of famous artists spark copyright and industry debate
Music festival canceled or postponed disappointing ticket holders
Vinyl records and physical music sales see a nostalgic resurgence
